name: @tsnuke/rules-type-assertions-effect
description: Effect-native rewrite of tsnuke's `type-assertions` rule category (RULE-025): 12 SYN AST/comment predicates (no-angle-bracket-assertion, no-assertion-on-json-parse, no-cast-after-guard, no-cast-in-return, no-double-assertion, no-non-null-asserted-optional-chain, no-non-null-assertion, no-ts-ignore, no-ts-nocheck, no-unsafe-object-assertion, prefer-satisfies-over-as, ts-expect-error-requires-description) + 1 TYP type-aware predicate (no-unnecessary-non-null-assertion, which early-returns without ctx.checker). Strangler-fig slice — consumes @tsnuke/rules-core-effect for the rule substrate (defineRule/runRule/runTypeAwareRule/Rule/RuleContext) and @tsnuke/contracts-effect for the Diagnostic/RuleMeta contracts. Plain-TS AST predicates wrapping the TS compiler API — NOT Effect-wrapped (visitors are sync). The three comment-directive rules (no-ts-ignore, no-ts-nocheck, ts-expect-error-requires-description) scan SourceFile full text via a SourceFile-keyed visitor — mechanism ported verbatim.
